name: China ZhongDi Dairy Holdings Company Limited
summary: China ZhongDi Dairy Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, operates dairy farms in the People's Republic of China. The company operates in two segments, Dairy Farming Business and Import Trading Business. It raises and breeds dairy cows; produces raw milk; and sells reproduced heifers. The company is also involved in the import and sale of cows, alfalfa hay, breeding stock, and other animal husbandry-related products, as well as the provision of import agency services. As of December 31, 2019, it owned and operated eight dairy farms, including Beijing ZhongDi Farm, Inner Mongolia ZhongDi Diary, Helan ZhongDi Farm, Ningxia ZhongDi Farm, Kuandian ZhongDi Farm, Langfang ZhongDi Farm, Tianzhen ZhongDi Farm, and Tianjin ZhongDi Farm. China ZhongDi Dairy Holdings Company Limited was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
